comboDetector.label: Combo Detector
comboDetector.title: Detect infinite loops: end mandatory loops automatically and show ∞ resources (off by default)

gameMenu.sandboxToolsTitle: Sandbox Tools — set up any board state (`)

hostControl.replaceConfirm: Replace {{name}} with AI? This removes them from the room.

grantDebug.heading: Sandbox: Debug Permissions
grantDebug.description: Grant other players the ability to submit debug actions. Their actions are logged publicly.

help.title: Help & Shortcuts
help.subtitle: Digital Magic flow for paper players: stops, priority, passing, and recovery tools.
help.recoveryDescription: If a card misbehaves, export state first. The advanced debug panel is available when you need to inspect or adjust the game.

prompt.starting: The game is starting or restoring state.
prompt.mulliganDecide: Choose whether to keep this opening hand or take a mulligan.
prompt.mulliganWaitDecide: Waiting for another player to decide their opening hand.
prompt.mulliganBottom: Choose cards to put on the bottom after keeping a mulligan hand.
prompt.mulliganWaitBottom: Waiting for another player to finish their mulligan.
prompt.openingHandBottom: Choose a card to put on the bottom before normal mulligans begin.
prompt.openingHandWait: Waiting for another player to resolve their opening hand.
prompt.waitOther: Waiting for another player to act.
prompt.priorityStack: You have priority with something on the stack. Resolve passes priority so the top item can resolve.
prompt.priorityAutoPass: You have priority. The client may auto-pass quiet windows unless a stop or Full Control is on.
prompt.priorityActions: You have priority. You can use available cards or pass to keep the turn moving.
prompt.priorityPass: You have priority. Passing continues to the next step or player.
prompt.manaPayment: Pay mana for the pending spell or ability. Press T to tap available lands.
prompt.targetSelection: Choose the highlighted legal target or cancel if the prompt allows it.
prompt.declareAttackers: Choose attackers, then confirm attackers. You can also attack with none.
prompt.declareBlockers: Choose blockers and assign them to attackers, then confirm blockers.
prompt.chooseXValue: Choose a value for X before continuing with the spell or ability.
prompt.payAmountChoice: Choose how much of the requested resource to pay.
prompt.default: The game is waiting for your choice. Follow the active prompt to continue.

automaticPhaseSkips.title: Automatic phase skips
automaticPhaseSkips.body: Phase skips are automatic. Use stops or Full Control when you want paper-style priority windows.

phaseStops.title: Phase stops
phaseStops.body: A stop pauses before that step, similar to saying you may act before combat, before draw, or before the end step in paper.

fullControl.title: Full Control
fullControl.body: Full Control keeps priority windows from being skipped, including spots where the digital client would normally keep the game moving.

resolve.title: Resolve
resolve.body: Resolve means you pass priority so the top spell or ability on the stack can resolve if everyone else also passes.

passToEnd.title: Pass to End
passToEnd.body: Pass to End keeps passing priority for the turn unless a choice, stop, or Full Control interrupts.

manaPayment.title: Mana payment
manaPayment.body: During mana payment, you can tap lands manually or press T to tap available lands.

combatDeclarations.title: Combat declarations
combatDeclarations.body: The game asks for attackers and blockers only during the declaration steps. Choose creatures, then confirm the declaration.

passPriority.title: Pass priority
passPriority.body: Pass priority or advance through the current priority prompt.

undo.title: Undo
undo.body: Undo the last local action that did not reveal hidden information.

cancel.title: Cancel
cancel.body: Cancel the current selection, mana payment, target selection, or auto-pass when available.

advancedDebugPanel.title: Advanced debug panel
advancedDebugPanel.body: Open the advanced debug panel. Most players should start with Recovery Tools first.

reportOrExportState.title: Report or export state
reportOrExportState.body: If a card misbehaves, export the current game state so the exact board position can be reproduced.

boardRightClickMenu.title: Board right-click menu
boardRightClickMenu.body: On desktop, right-click empty board space for the game log, recovery/debug tools, and background settings.

flowNudge.message: Phase skips are automatic. Use stops or Full Control when you want paper-style priority windows.

sandboxNudge.message: Set up any board state with <tools>Sandbox Tools</tools> — add cards and tokens, change life and counters, copy permanents, or jump phases. Open it anytime with the <key>`</key> key.

reportCardNudge.message: See a card render or play wrong? Tap the <flag>report flag</flag> in the top-left to flag it so we can fix it.

errorBoundary.heading: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The app hit an unexpected error and can't continue on this screen. Reloading usually fixes it.
